summary: Venezuela search interest spiking on Feb 17 to 58 from 39-46 baseline, driven by intense US-Venezuela news cycle
content: Key data: Feb 17=58 (30-day scale), baseline Feb 8-16: 39-46. In resolution scale (Jan 28-Feb 27): Feb 17 rescales to ~74. Doesn't change needs Feb 27 in ~55-60 absolute. News: oil licenses, Energy Sec visit, Trump considering Caracas visit (no date). Change stats base rates: Inc 22.6%, Dec 25.8%, DC 51.6%.
